title: Fix broken logo image in navbar (asset loading issue)

requirements.summary: Audit and fix the logo image reference in Header.tsx to ensure correct asset path resolution in production builds
acceptanceCriteria: The logo `` tag in `Header.tsx` references a path that resolves correctly in the production build.
The logo filename on disk matches the reference exactly, including letter case.
No broken image icon appears in the navbar in any route (home, listings, detail pages, etc.).
The logo loads correctly when tested in an incognito browser window with cache cleared.

file_operations.description: Update the logo image `src` attribute to use the correct workspace path: `frontend/public/assets/generated/styo-logo-transparent.dim_200x80.png`. Ensure the path is root-relative (starts with `/assets/generated/`) to work correctly in production builds and nested routes. Verify the filename matches the asset exactly, including case sensitivity and the `.dim_200x80` dimension suffix.

requirements.summary: Verify the logo asset file exists at the correct location and is included in the production build
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image file exists in the project at the path referenced by `Header.tsx`.
The asset appears in the production build output directory.
The navbar displays the logo image (not a broken image placeholder) after a fresh production build.

file_operations.description: Ensure the generated logo asset `styo-logo-transparent.dim_200x80.png` physically exists in `frontend/public/assets/generated/`. If the file is missing, restore it from the workspace assets list. This file must be present for the Header logo reference to resolve correctly in both development and production builds.

requirements.summary: Verify and fix the logo image reference in Footer.tsx using the same corrected path approach
acceptanceCriteria: The Footer also renders the logo image without a broken image icon.
Both Header and Footer use the same consistent logo asset path.

file_operations.description: Update the Footer logo image `src` attribute to use the same corrected workspace path as the Header: `/assets/generated/styo-logo-transparent.dim_200x80.png`. Ensure consistency between Header and Footer logo references, using the same root-relative path format that works correctly across all routes in production builds.
